name: Ovarian Cancer - CA-125 Tumor Marker Query (Elevated)
description: Tests ability to find ovarian cancer patients via elevated CA-125 (Cancer Antigen 125). CA-125 is the primary ovarian cancer tumor marker for diagnosis and surveillance. Normal range is <35 U/mL; values above 35 are clinically significant. Synthea generates CA-125 >100 U/mL for active ovarian cancer patients.
prompt: Find patients with elevated CA-125 (Cancer Antigen 125) lab results greater than 35 units per milliliter — the clinical threshold for ovarian cancer workup.

prompts.broad: Find patients with elevated Cancer Antigen 125 (CA-125) — values greater than 35 U/mL, the standard ovarian cancer screening and surveillance threshold.
prompts.expert: I need Observation resources with elevated CA-125. Use LOINC code 10334-1 (Cancer Ag 125 [Units/volume] in Serum or Plasma). Filter by value-quantity greater than 35 U/mL. Query: Observation?code=http://loinc.org|10334-1&value-quantity=gt35||U/mL

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with elevated CA-125. Sensitive but not specific (also raised in endometriosis, fibroids, pregnancy).

required_codes.display: Cancer Ag 125 [Units/volume] in Serum or Plasma
